hrSettings.leaveRulesDesc: Configure how annual leave is accrued and calculated.
hrSettings.leaveRateHint: Determines how many days employees earn per month (Moroccan law: 1.5 days/month).
hrSettings.saturdaysHint: When calculating leave duration, should Saturdays be counted as working days?
hrSettings.salaryPaymentDesc: Set default payment preferences for payroll processing.
hrSettings.ribHint: Company's primary bank account for salary transfers (24 digits).
hrSettings.workingHoursHint: Enter the start and end hours (0-23 format). Example: Start 9, End 17 for 9 AM to 5 PM.
hrSettings.helpDescription: Configure core HR parameters that affect payroll calculations, leave management, and compliance.
hrSettings.helpPoint1: Working days and hours determine overtime calculations and daily rates.
hrSettings.helpPoint2: Leave accrual rate affects how vacation days are earned (1.5 days/month is standard in Morocco).
hrSettings.helpPoint3: Payment settings establish defaults for new employees and payroll processing.
hrSettings.saveNote: Changes will apply to future payroll calculations only.
hrSettings.collectiveAgreementPlaceholder: E.g.: National Collective Agreement for Commerce
hrSettings.cnssSpecificParamsPlaceholder: Specific CNSS parameters for this company
